valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 1 May 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 2 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low Shannon 1015 expected southwest Ireland 1012 by midday tomorrow

Forties.text:
Wind
In southeast, southerly or southeasterly 3 to 5, becoming variable 3 or less, then northwesterly 2 to 4 later. In northwest, southerly 3 to 5, becoming cyclonic 2 to 4, then northeasterly 3 to 5 later.
Sea state
In southeast, slight or moderate, becoming slight. in northwest, slight or moderate.
Weather
In southeast, rain. In northwest, rain or showers, fog patches later.
Visibility
In southeast, good, occasionally poor. In northwest, moderate or good, occasionally very poor later.
